---
execute:
  echo: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig.path: figures/
    fig.pos: H
params:
  university:
    values:
      CU: Curtin University (AAGI-CU)
      AU: University of Adelaide (AAGI-AU)
      UQ: University of Queensland (AAGI-UQ)
    value: CU
  pri_bio: Your.Name
  project_code: GRDC/AAGI Project Code
  partner: Client Name (Client Organisation)
  partner_email: your.email@example.edu.au
  report_title: Informative title for short report
date: last-modified
date-format: long
format:
  aagi-html+report:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: _extensions/AAGI-AUS/aagi/assets/biometrics.csl

title: !expr params$report_title
subtitle: !expr paste("Report for", params$project_code)
author:
  - !expr sprintf("Prepared for: %s", params$partner)
  - !expr sprintf("Prepared by: %s, Author 2", params$pri_bio)
university: !expr params$university
email: !expr params$partner_email
---

```{r}
#| label: load
#| message: false

# Ensure pak is installed (using custom repo block)
if (!requireNamespace("pak", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages(
    "pak",
    repos = sprintf(
      "https://r-lib.github.io/p/pak/stable/%s/%s/%s",
      .Platform$pkgType,
      R.Version()$os,
      R.Version()$arch
    )
  )
}

# Helper: install (if needed) via pak, from CRAN or GitHub
ensure_pkg <- function(pkg, github = NULL) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    if (!is.null(github)) {
      pak::pak(github, dependencies = TRUE)
    } else {
      pak::pak(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)
    }
  }
}

# Install packages needed for this report
ensure_pkg("ggplot2")
ensure_pkg("flextable")
ensure_pkg("AAGIThemes", github = "AAGI-AUS/AAGIThemes")
ensure_pkg("AAGIPalettes", github = "AAGI-AUS/AAGIPalettes")

library(ggplot2)
library(flextable)
library(AAGIThemes)
library(AAGIPalettes)

# Set plot/table themes (ensure HTML styling is always AAGI)
theme_set(theme_aagi())
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_ft_aagi)
